tools.name: charts.chartsChartsChartupdateGetId
tools.description: Gets a ChartDataDTO object, usually used for downstream analytics and chart updates

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsChartupdatePutId
tools.description: Simplifies chart update by allowing users to supply data via ChartDataDTO

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsChildobjectsGetId
tools.description: This endpoint is helpful for helping users and bots identify dependent objects to this Chart and retreive their corresponding metadata in order to make modifications to those objects in downstream operations.

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsDetailsGetId
tools.description: Returns object metadata and information about relative dependent objects

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsGetId
tools.description: Get by Id: Use this method to retrieve a Charts object by its primary key (id)

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsOpenofficexmlGetIdUpdated
tools.description: Return the subset of the xml content from within the latest edited version of the OpenXmlDocument from this Chart object.  The returned xml data conforms to the [Ecma-376 standard](http://www.ecma-international.org/publications/standards/Ecma-376.htm).  Use this endpoint a starting point for building client-side extensions that modify Presalytics widgets containing Chart objects.

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsOpenofficexmlPutId
tools.description: Directly eidt the underlying xml of a Chart object within an OpenOpenXml (e.g. Excel, Powerpoint) document. This endpoint will validatate the submitted xml against the [Ecma-376 standard](http://www.ecma-international.org/publications/standards/Ecma-376.htm) prior to saving modification.  Invalid xml will rejected by this endpoint and a (hopefully) helpful error message will be returned.  Use this endpoint for client-side automation of modifications ot Chart objects.

tools.name: charts.chartsChartsSvgGetIdUseCache
tools.description: This endpoint is helpful for rending this Chart as an svg or image object that can then be rendered in a story, dashboard or website.

tools.description:
Permantly delete a document from the Ooxml Automation API. Note that is does not make changes to the related Presalytics APIs.
Please use the delete endpoint in the story API to ensure that stories are not left with orphaned references to the Ooxml Automation API.
